# Copilot Instructions

This repository uses `AGENTS.md` as the primary AI agent guide. Read `AGENTS.md` first.

Key points:
- Node 24.x with `type: module`
- Express 5 web app in `server.js`
- Discord bot in `src/index.js`
- Slash commands live in `src/comandos/`
- Ticket button flow lives in `src/handlers/ticketHandler.js`
- Do not hardcode secrets; use `.env`
- No automated test suite is present
